title: Preload ordering via query-tuple
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.users_with_recent_comments_first/0` that returns users with `:comments` preloaded AND each user's comments ordered by `inserted_at desc`. Use query-tuple preload syntax: `preload: [comments: ^ordered_comments_query]` where `ordered_comments_query` is `from(c in Comment, order_by: [desc: c.inserted_at])`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Query-tuple preload with ordering — niche but valuable when preloads need to be ordered.
